feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Application Studio
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Application Studio Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Business Application Studio - HANA Native objects (CV)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a requirement to create SAP SAP HANA native models like Calculation views etc. in SAP Business Application studio, but my S/4 HANA system is on-premise.

Do you think it is possible to connect SAP BAS(BTP) to on-premise SAP S/4 HANA and create modelling artifacts? What are pros & cons to this solution? Client is not interested for any other cloud based Analytics solution.

 

Thanks

Subodh

entry.title: Business Application Studio - Adding test cases learning unit - test.js
entry.content:
Hello,

I am learning ABAP coding.
The current unit is Building side-by-side extensions on SAP BTP/Adding Test Cases
https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/build-side-by-side-extensions-on-sap-btp/adding-test-cases
When I test the application there are errors. I tried to install components, went back to see if I had missed something.

I found the test.js code might be the issue.
The test.js code can be found in two places.
1 - https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/add-test-cases.html
When I copy the first, there are 3 errors.
2 - https://github.com/SAP-samples/teched2023-XP260/tree/main/exercises/Add%20Test%20Cases
When I copy the second, there are 2 errors.
Errors are attached.

I tried to figure out what might be the issue but I haven't found it yet.
Any idea?

Thanks
Laszlo

entry.title: Business Application Studio in BTP - Unable to connect to ABAP backend
entry.content:
Hi Experts.

Since yesterday (Tuesday) I have been unable to make a connection to an OnPremise ABAP (S/4HANA) system, when testing a UI5 app. The setup has been working for a long time, but now I cannot connect. When I start my UI5 app, the $metadata call made by the UI5 framework fails. I have also tried using a curl statement directly in the Terminal, and that does not work either.

I have tried testing for different customers, thereby using different subaccounts, SAP Cloud Connector and backend systems. I have also tested both in eu10 and eu20.

However when using the wizard to create a new application with the basic template delivered by SAP, I am able to make a call to the backend to extract the list of OData services. So the connection is technically working, I just cannot use it for testing my application in BAS.

Does anybody else have similar problems ?

Thanks and best regard,

Søren Hansen

entry.title: I want to use HTML5 Vocabulary RowSpanForDuplicateValues ​​feature. Please tell me how.
entry.content:
I want to use HTML5 Vocabulary RowSpanForDuplicateValues ​​feature. Please tell me how.

 
<Annotation Term="UI.LineItem" >
                <Collection>                    
                    <Record Type="UI.DataField">                                      
                        <PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="CategoryID"/>
                        <PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>category}"/>                    
                        <Annotation Term="HTML5.RowSpanForDuplicateValues" Bool="true"/>
 .............................................
 
I configured it as above, but there is no change on the screen.

 

===============================

HTML5 Vocabulary

Namespace: com.sap.vocabularies.HTML5.v1

Terms for HTML5

The HTML5 vocabulary provides rendering hints for HTML5 clients

Terms

Term Type Description

CssDefaultsCssDefaultsTypeCSS definitions that may be used as defaults
This term can applied to e.g. UI.DataFieldAbstract records
LinkTargetLinkTargetTypeWhere to open a link for the annotated URL
When the UI contains a link to the URL, it shall open as specified by this annotation. This can be achieved, for example, by giving the UI5 sap.m.Link element a corresponding target property. Applicability of this term is governed by Validation.ApplicableTerms annotations.
RowSpanForDuplicateValues (Experimental)TagThe annotated data field might use a rowSpan for adjacent duplicate values if used in a table.
In order to achieve a good user experience the respective columns should be sorted. Applicability of this term is governed by Validation.ApplicableTerms annotations.

entry.title: Error fiori app generator failed
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am trying to generate a SAP Fiori generator in SAP business application studio but when choose template and press Next 

It have message error:

Help me to fix this

entry.title: Erroneous Authentication Popup when Previewing Fiori Application in BAS
entry.content:
I'm a longtime ABAP developer who is currently learning Fiori development & I'm running into an issue that has me stumped. Below are the steps that I have taken to get to where I am now.

1. I am using S4HANA demo system A4H that is running in a docker container on my desktop computer.
2. In A4H, I created OData project ZFUM in SEGW, implemented the needed ABAP code, and exposed this on the gateway as service ZFUM_SRV.
3. In A4H's docker container, I'm also running a Cloud Connector instance.
4. I created a BTP Trial account and connected this trial account to the Cloud Connector instance running in the A4H docker container.
5. I created destination A4H in the BTP Cockpit using BasicAuthentication specifying the user and password of a user in A4H.
6. I subscribed to BAS in the BTP Cockpit and created a dev space in BAS.
7. In the BAS dev space, I created a basic freestyle Fiori project using the A4H destination and the ZFUM_SRV service.
8. I developed some views in the Fiori project using the OData service and I was successfully able to preview this application in BAS without being presented any authentication popups (since the user and password are specified in the BTP destination).
9. Ok, no problems yet. So, when I'm done for the day, I close BAS and shutdown the docker container running A4H and Cloud Connector.
10. The next day, I start the docker container with A4H and start the Cloud Connector. I start the dev space in BAS, but now when I try to preview the app, it is presenting the following authentication popup:

It should not be asking for user and password because that is specified in the BTP destination. I tried providing the same user & password the destination is using, but it does not work and the data is not fetched. The only solution I have found so far is to delete the dev space in BAS, create a new dev space, & clone the same Fiori development files from git. After I do this, then the preview works as it did the previous day and the OData calls are successful without seeing any authentication popup.

This workaround is fine for now I suppose, but it seems extreme to have to recreate a dev space every day. So, I assume there is something I am missing to prevent this issue. What can I do to prevent this problem or to more gracefully address it each time I see it happen?

entry.title: Find source code of fiori applications in Business Application Studio
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I am sorry to ask this stupid question, but I did not find the answer by myself.

I am working on a SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud 2502 system, and I know that some custom fiori applications were developed in this system, some of which are based on the fiori elements model.

I am able to find the RAP cloud ABAP code written for the fiori elements applications in Eclipse ADT, OK. But How to see the "application code" generated in Business Application Studio BAS?

How in BTP, Business Application Studio, can I find the source code of the fiori elements applications, as well as the non fiori applications? I tried looking everywhere, but I do not see them when I connect to my own dev space, in BAS, from BTP tool.

Thank you for your help

entry.title: Cannot log into SAP Business Application Studio Trial Edition
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to access the SAP Business Application Studio from the BTP Cockpit trial edition.  I have an S-ID with a subscription to the SAP Learning Hub.  I have my SAP BTP Trial account set up.  I have my trial subaccount set up.  The Cloud Foundry Environment and Kyma Environment are up and running.  I have a dev space created in the Cloud Foundry.

When I go the the Trial Home of the BTP Cockpit, I click on SAP Business Application Studio.  It asks me for a username and password, so I enter the one that I'm currently logged into the cockpit with and I get an error message.  This is what I get:

I'm not sure what I am doing wrong to get this message.  When I go into the subaccount I created, I go to Security -> Users and I have added the following roles (I found a post stating these role collections should be added to my account):
- Business_Application_Studio_Administrator
- Business_Application_Studio_Developer
- Business_Application_Studio_Extension_Deployer

Has anyone run into this problem or have any idea as to what I need to change?  The error message also gives me a troubleshooting correlation ID but if you go to create a message to send to SAP through me.sap.com, it tells you they don't support messages for free trials of products.

Thanks in advance,
Kevin

entry.title: How to Add Custom Fields from Custom CDS View into OData based App Variant (PO Goods Receipt)?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm working on a Fiori Elements app variant (s2p.mm.im.goodsreceipt.purchaseorder) 

I'm using SAP Business Application Studio.

Requirement is to add some custom fields in the item table as new columns. I was able to add the column details and also put some placeholders. But I'm stuck on how to map the field values.

I have created a new CDS view with the required fields and then published it via the OData Annotation, also checked its functionality in the transaction- /IWFND/GW_CLIENT.

I have then imported this OData to the Adaptation project using the Add OData and UI5 Model Wizard provided. I could see the change also recorded. Now, I have the following questions.

1. How can I check if the OData is properly linked with the project or not?
2. How can I map the fields which are part of this new OData at an item level for each PO?

I'm working on UI for the first time. Any comment would be of great help.
Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Error code when trying to connect to remote landscape on local VSCode
entry.content:
Hello,

I planned to work on BAS from my local VSCode (so I can use GitHub Copilot), but when I'm trying to connect to my landscape, an error code shows up in a new browser window:

{"description":"Unknown request","error_code":"CF-NotFound","code":10000}

I'm using the Business Application Studio Toolkit extension on VSCode and I'm on a free-trial account on SAP BTP.

Am I missing something? 

Thanks in advance for your help

entry.title: List Control “Entity Set” pop up button missing
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I want to create an SAP Fiori App using SAP Business Application Studio, but "Select Entity Set" pop up missing. 

 

Regards!

Dan

entry.title: How to turn off the 'Add Comments | Refactor' automatically appearing line in the BAS Editor?
entry.content:
Hi Colleagues,

I'm using BAS, and whenever i select a variable/line in the code editor, automatically an 'Add Comment | Refactor' option appears above the selection, right in the middle of the code, which pushes the entire code down by a line, which, to be diplomatic, is extremely annoying.

I tried to turn off any AI Assistant related settings but could not figure out, how to get rid of these automatically appearing in line 'helping' features.

Do any of you have any ideas? The feature i'm talking about is this:

Every time you select something, this appear above, which moves the entire code.

Thank You and Best Regards,
Mihaly

entry.title: Cannot connect to a service - Build code to SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hello, I am developing an extension in SAP Build Code, and when trying to add a SSFF service, it does not appear as available.

 

 

The BTP Trial account has already been registered in the SSFF product, and the destination has been created.

 

 

As mentioned in the help documentation, it seems that this tool is not available when using the Full-Stack Application with the Productivity Tools dev space.

 

 

I would like to know if there is another way to add a SuccessFactors service in SAP Build Code within a Full-Stack Application project using the Productivity Tools dev space.

Has anyone else experienced the same issue?
Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Unable to access user details in UI5 application in BAS hosted on BTP cloud foundry.
entry.content:
Hi All,
I am trying to get details of user who as logged in to the application which is hosted on BTP cloud foundry.
I am using BAS for development.
I have used this code for this:

_fetchUserInfo: function () {
        fetch("/user-api/userinfo")
          .then(response => {
            if (!response.ok) {
              throw new Error("Failed to fetch user info");
            }
            return response.json();
          })
          .then(userInfo => {
            console.log("Logged-in user info:", userInfo);
            MessageToast.show("Welcome, " + userInfo.user_name);
          })
          .catch(error => {
            console.error("Error fetching user info:", error);
          });
      }

I have added the user api in xs-app.json as well:

"routes":[
{
      "csrfProtection": false,
      "source": "^/user-api(.*)",
      "target": "$1",
      "service": "sap-approuter-userapi",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa"
    } 
]

After deploying the application to BTP I am getting error 404 not found.

Should I add this
this.getOwnerComponent().getManifestObject().resolveUri(sPath); in url

Please let me know how i can fix this issue.

entry.title: Not able to run MDK application through run as local web app option
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are working on MDK application using OData service, while running the application on Your Dev Space (run as local web app) option in Business Application studio, we are facing some issues as mentioned in below screenshot:

This error not only belongs to that particular app, we are facing this one for others apps also.

Along with it when we try to run the app on Mobile Svcs app in Android we are not able to fetch data and getting this error:

 

 

Any help would be appreciated on this.

@bill_froelich 

Thanks and Regards,

Madhav

entry.title: SAPUI5 how to filter at column level
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to develop an fiori application for SAP S/4 HANA using BTP Business application studio.

Product and Product Description has 1:n relation.

I have two columns in one table and I would like to display both Product ID and Description (filtered language eq English) in one table.

I think I have to use the filter. But how can I apply the filter only to one column? I want to use the filter something like this.  {path:'to_Description',parameters:{select:'Description'}, filters: [{path: 'Language', operator: 'EQ', value1: 'EN'}]}

Below is how my table is which is not displaying description. My goal is to displaying description.

 

<Table id="table" width="auto" items="{path: '/Material', parameters: {expand: 'to_Description'} }" noDataText="{worklistView>/tableNoDataText}" busyIndicatorDelay="{worklistView>/tableBusyDelay}" growing="true" growingScrollToLoad="true" updateFinished=".onUpdateFinished">

                <columns>
                    <Column id="materialColumn">
                        <Text text="Product ID" id="materialColumnTitle"/>
                    </Column>
                    <Column id="descriptionColumn">
                        <Text text="Description" id="descriptionColumnTitle"/>
                    </Column>
                </columns>

                <items>
                    <ColumnListItem type="Navigation" press=".onPress" id="test3">
                        <cells>
                            <Text text="{Material}"/>
                            <Text text="{to_Description/ProductDescription}" id="test2"/>
                        </cells>
                    </ColumnListItem>
                             
                </items>
            </Table>

entry.title: How to use nested $filter inside $expand while working with projection functions, CQL, OData?
entry.content:
Hello team,
I have following Odata query which works fine in Postman. Now I have to implement same logic in CAP.
.com/odata/v4/OPPS/BusinessUnitAssignments?$filter=(businessUnitID eq '1234')&$expand=promotion($filter=statusCode eq 'AC' and filterBuId eq 'CZP1%7C2B';$expand=promotionPriceDerivationRules($select=priceDerivationRuleID)) 

Here we need to expand promotion but only include promotions that match statusCode='AC' and filterBuId='CZP1|2B'

As you can see in query, we have to use 2 times expand, hence joined query with "semicolon". But in first expand we must use $filter, but in the beginning of query, we have already used $filter.
In CAP as we know, $filter == where()

Are there any limitations in .column() projection while doing filtering inside expansions?
How to use .where() clause in this situation?
Please support. Thanks.
Ex- This below snippet examples works fine but now how to use statusCode and filterBuId

            const results = await remote.run(
                SELECT.from(BusinessUnitAssignments)
                    .columns(b => {
                        b.businessUnitID,
                        b.promotion(p => {
                            p.promotionID,
                            p.promotionPriceDerivationRules(r => {
                                r.promotionPriceDerivationRuleID
                            })
                        })
                    })
                    .where({
                        businessUnitID: CustomerID,
                    })
            );

@vvdries @gregorw @qmacro

entry.title: SAP CAP - How to Set Attribute Type as Integer When Mocking User in package.json?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm currently mocking a user in my package.json for local testing in a CAP project, like this:

 

"gabriel": {
  "password": "@Teste123",
  "roles": ["AMS"],
  "attr": {
    "ams": "1"
  }
}

In the restrict rule, I need to compare the ams attribute as an integer:

{
  grant: ['READ'],
  to   : ['FORNECEDOR', 'TRANSPORTADOR', 'AMS'],
  where: '( CriadoPor = $user or Transportadora = $user ) or $user.AMS = 1'
}

This works fine in the deployed environment, where xs-security.json defines the ams attribute like this:

 
"attributes": [
  {
    "name": "ams",
    "description": "ams",
    "valueType": "int"
  }
]

However, during local development, the mocked ams attribute is always treated as a string (e.g., "1"), and the comparison with the integer 1 in the where clause fails.

Is there a way to define the type of a mocked attribute as int in package.json, or any workaround to handle this locally?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: SAP Application for Android/IOS Devices
entry.content:
Hello All,

I would like to know the opinion from Community members on building Fiori app for Android/IOS Devices. 

So far, explored the concepts of SAP Mobile Services with SAP Build(MDK Application) and SAP Business Application Studio from #https://developers.sap.com/mission.mobile-dev-kit-get-started.html

SAP Mobile Start - #https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/mobile-start-access-launchpad-site.html

Any other suggestions on building native apps using SAPUI5 library?

Thanks,

Muthu.

entry.title: Error Message when deploying from Business Application Studio
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am new with the the Business Application Studio (and BTP spaces) and I am currently going through the example for the POD View Plugin for SAP DM Plugins (https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/pod-plugin-developer-s-guide/view-pod-plugin-template-and-example?locale=en-US). When deploying the code the following error message is displayed:

I have made the name of our BTP account unrecognizable. This was in the blackened place as the organization.

I think to solve this error something in BTP needs to be adjusted, but I am not sure. Does anyone know what I need to do to solve the error?

Thanks!
